title: Evolutionary Epigenomics of Retrotransposon-Mediated Methylation Spreading in Rice.
author: Choi JY Purugganan MD
content: S-EPMC5850837 PMC5850837 Evolutionary Epigenomics of Retrotransposon-Mediated Methylation Spreading in Rice. Plant genomes contain numerous transposable elements (TEs), and many hypotheses on the evolutionary drivers that restrict TE activity have been postulated. Few models, however, have focused
